zh.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cornelius Hurlbut於大約1654年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德時，他的父親Thomas Hurlbut45歲，母親Sarah Elizabeth Nye48歲。他於從1685年1月到1685年12月與Rebecca Butler在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1751年8月9日享年98歲。

zh-hans.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cornelius Hurlbut于大约1654年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德时，他的父亲Thomas Hurlbut45岁，母亲Sarah Elizabeth Nye48岁。他于从1685年1月到1685年12月与Rebecca Butler在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1751年8月9日享年98岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hurlbut
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from a medieval game called hurlebatte, which took its name from ‘short battes of a cubit long and a halfe, with pykes of yron, and were tied to a line, that when they were throwne, one might plucke them again’ (1565–73). Compare ‘Pleying at The two hande swerd, at swerd and bokelere, and at two pyked staf, at The hurlebatte’ (about 1450 in MED).

nameMeanings.name: Cornelius
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an old Roman family name, Cornélius, which is of uncertain origin, possibly a derivative of Latin cornu ‘horn’. This was the name of a 3rd-century pope who is venerated as a saint. The name was particularly popular in the Low Countries, and immigrants contributed to its frequency in the north of England from the 1400s. However, it is now seldom used in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Cornelius Hurlbut was born about 1654, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Thomas Hurlbut, was 45 and his mother, Sarah Elizabeth Nye, was 48. He married Rebecca Butler from January 1685 to December 1685, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 9 August 1751, at the age of 98.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cornelius Hurlbut est né environ 1654, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Hurlbut, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Sarah Elizabeth Nye, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Rebecca Butler du janvier 1685 au décembre 1685, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 9 août 1751, à l’âge de 98 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cornelius Hurlbut um 1654 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Hurlbut 45 und seine Mutter Sarah Elizabeth Nye 48. Er hat von Januar 1685 bis Dezember 1685 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Rebecca Butler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 9. August 1751 im Alter von 98 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cornelius Hurlbut è nato il circa 1654 nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Thomas Hurlbut, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Elizabeth Nye, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Rebecca Butler da gennaio 1685 a dicembre 1685, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 9 agosto 1751, all'età di 98 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cornelius Hurlbutが約1654年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで生まれた時，父Thomas Hurlbutは45歳，母Sarah Elizabeth Nyeは48歳であった。から1685年1月まで1685年12月にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドでRebecca Butlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1751年8月9日に98歳で死去した。

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드

ko.lifeSummary: Cornelius Hurlbut(이)가 대략 1654년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Hurlbut(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Elizabeth Nye(은)는 48세였다. 그는 1685년 1월 부터 1685년 12월 까지 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 Rebecca Butler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1751년 8월 9일 98세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cornelius Hurlbut nasceu aproximadamente 1654, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Hurlbut, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Elizabeth Nye, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Rebecca Butler de janeiro de 1685 a dezembro de 1685, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1751, com 98 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cornelius Hurlbut родился около 1654 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Thomas Hurlbut было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Elizabeth Nye, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Rebecca Butler с январь 1685 по декабрь 1685 в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 9 августа 1751 г. в возрасте 98 лет.
